greeting: Hi. I'm Mia. I'm not a slide, I'm a system Adam built. Ask me anything out loud, or tap one of the questions below to get us started.
p0: I'm a voice that knows exactly what Adam built, and never gets tired of talking about it, which is more than you can say for a human at a booth. But here's the real idea: imagine your own version of me on your website, chatting with your clients, and capturing your leads at three in the morning, while you sleep. Adam builds exactly that.
p7: You tapped a button, and I handed you a neat little line, so fair enough, that proves nothing. Don't take my word for it: hold that mic and ask me anything, completely off-script, and watch me handle it live. That's the real proof.
p1: A version of me lives on your site, greets every visitor, answers their questions, and quietly works out who's serious, budget, timeline, what they're after, then hands you the hot ones. You wake up to a list of ready leads, instead of a missed call. Tap the WhatsApp button, and Adam will set it up.
p9: I keep working, that's the whole point. While you're asleep, or with another client, a version of me sits on your website, answering questions and catching the leads that would've bounced off a contact form. You just wake up to them. A tireless you, basically.
p2: Quite a lot. The flagship is PropSight, a Singapore property platform that runs itself, writes its own market reports, and values homes to within about four percent. But it goes wider than property: smart CRMs that sort and chase your leads on their own, dashboards that run a business end to end, research engines that brief you every morning, and voices like me. Property's just where you see it live. The same engineering works anywhere.
p3: It's a comps model, but a transparent one. It pulls real caveats from official government data, weighs the most similar recent sales, and adjusts for things like storey, and remaining lease. It lands within about four percent of the actual price, and it shows its working. Adam built it, and backtested the whole thing, himself.
p4: I run on a language model, sure. But that's the easy part, anyone can rent that. Knowing exactly what Adam built, answering as his own system, staying accurate on Singapore property, that's the work around the model. And I'm the proof it works.
p5: Whatever eats your team's time. A smart CRM that sorts and follows up your leads for you, a research engine that briefs you every morning, a tool your clients self-serve, or a responder like me that talks to leads the second they come in. Tell me what you still do by hand, and I'll tell you what Adam would automate.
p8: Faster than you'd expect. Adam builds things like me in days, not months, because he works fast, and he's done the hard parts many times over. The slow bit is usually you deciding exactly what you want, not him building it. Tap the WhatsApp button, and he'll give you a real timeline.
p6: Adam's the developer behind all of this, including me. One person built the property platform, the valuation model, the voice, everything you're seeing here. He makes custom systems for any business, and property's just where he proved it. Tap the WhatsApp button to talk to him.
